title: A Girl Named Mary Saotome
overview: Lacking in gambling skills, Tsuzura Hanatemari finds herself at the bottom of the food chain — until one day, an old friend transfers to the academy.

title: A Targeted Girl
overview: Student Council member Sakura Miharutaki faces off against a gamble crazed, unruly student. Mary's scheme backfires when an unexpected guest shows up.

title: A Traitorous Girl
overview: On the brink of becoming a house pet, Mary must find a way to earn money. Trust is on the line when she and her friends attend a "coupling party."

title: Confessing Girls
overview: With a traitor in their midst, Mary struggles with trusting her friends. Meanwhile, the opposing boys' team argues over whether to rejoin the game.

title: An Honest Girl
overview: Aoi attempts to lure Mary into his Full-Bloom society. Joining forces with Mikura, Sakura plots to undermine Mary through a gambling match.

title: A Resisting Girl
overview: Sakura and Mary brace themselves for the final game. In desperation, Mary asks her friends for help, using whatever means necessary to win.
